title: RBI Revokes Registration/License of 135 NBFCs - Regulatory Enforcement Action
description: RBI cancelled the certificate of registration of 135 NBFCs under Section 45-IA(6) of the RBI Act for regulatory violations, non-compliance with requirements, and failure to meet registration conditions. Most entities (125) were from West Bengal. Examples include Express Fincap House, Akshay Fiscal Services, Times Finance, and Jupiter Finvest.
